title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Care Hospitals

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Care Hospitals
jsonLd.description:
Care Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Care Hospitals:
Care Hospitals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Hospitals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
